pcatR 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Getting started with pcatR
    • Data standards and validation
    • Interpretation, privacy, and reporting
  • Changelog

Package index

End-to-end workflow

pcatR-package pcatR
pcatR: Analyze Pragmatic Context Assessment Tool Data
pcat_analyse() print(<pcat_analysis>)
Run the standard pCAT analysis workflow
pcat_write_analysis() pcat_save_profile_pdf()
Export pCAT analysis results and profile figures
pcat_user_guide()
Locate or open the pcatR technical user guide
pcat_self_test()
Run the built-in pcatR self-test

Instrument and mappings

pcat_items() pcat_construct_map() pcat_response_options() pcat_example_data() pcat_strategy_candidates()
Instrument metadata, CFIR mappings, and included example data

Data preparation

pcat_read_csv() pcat_standardize() pcat_template() pcat_write_template() pcat_wide_to_long() pcat_long_to_wide()
Prepare, import, and reshape pCAT data

Validation and analysis

pcat_validate() print(<pcat_validation>) pcat_validation_data() pcat_validation_issues()
Validate pCAT response data
pcat_classify()
Classify pCAT responses
pcat_summarise() pcat_consensus() pcat_change() pcat_action_plan()
Summarize, compare, and plan from pCAT data

Figures and interface

pcat_palette() plot_pcat_profile() plot_pcat_heatmap() plot_pcat_change()
Default pCAT plotting palette
pcat_write_analysis() pcat_save_profile_pdf()
Export pCAT analysis results and profile figures
pcat_app()
Launch the optional pCAT analysis dashboard

On this page
